name: snowflake
description: A Codeinfra package for creating and managing snowflake cloud resources.
attribution: This Codeinfra package is based on the [`snowflake` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/terraform-provider-snowflake).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Codeinfra package for creating and managing snowflake cloud resources.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/terraform-provider-snowflake)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`codeinfra-snowflake` repo](https://github.com/khulnasoft/codeinfra-snowflake/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-snowflake` repo](https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/terraform-provider-snowflake/issues).
